landing.headline: Turn reviews into
landing.description: Paste your business name and customer reviews. Upload store photos. Get a ready-to-post vertical marketing video in seconds — no editing skills needed.
landing.feature1Desc: Enter business name and reviews. Select a template. Click generate. Done.
landing.feature2Desc: Native Chinese script, voiceover, and industry-specific copy for local businesses.
landing.feature3Desc: Bold Food, Clean Service, Warm Local, Neon Night, Minimal Pro, Retro Diner. With smooth crossfade transitions.
landing.feature4Desc: Add real store images as video backgrounds. Up to 5 photos, with Ken Burns motion effect.
landing.footer: ReviewReel — Local business video ads, made simple.

generate.headline: Turn reviews into a 15-second vertical ad.
generate.autosave: Inputs autosave locally while you work.
generate.imageHelp: Optional. Upload up to 5 JPG, PNG, or WEBP images. The first 3 are used as video backgrounds.
generate.scriptPlaceholder: Generated copy appears here as soon as the first step finishes.
generate.videoReady: Video ready. Preview or download below.
generate.scenesPlaceholder: Scene images and the final MP4 will appear after generation.
generate.sampleReview1: Five stars. The staff was incredibly friendly and the service was fast.
generate.sampleReview2: Best tacos in the neighborhood. Fresh, flavorful, and always consistent.
generate.sampleReview3: I brought my whole family and everyone loved it. We will be back this week.
